rationale: Educ. Code §33.083 governs the University Interscholastic League's rules, audits, and reporting. It has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The University Interscholastic League is a part of The University of Texas at Austin and must submit its rules and procedures to the commissioner for approval or disapproval.
_note: Educ. Code §33.083 addresses interscholastic league governance and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b).
